examples: If a teenager swipes a wallet, we call it a crime.
She swipes an access fob, enters a PIN and attaches the hydrogen nozzle.
It detects fast moves like swipes; an upgrade will sense multiple taps at once.
On the plus side, that new touchscreen is delightfully responsive to both swipes and taps.
Mr Obama's swipes at the company have lent him an unfamiliar air of forcefulness.
